stimulus: Dr. Aprille Ericsson is an aerospace engineer. This means that Dr. Ericsson doesn't just design satellites for use today. She applies advanced physics and engineering principles ______blank spacecraft that will operate far into the future.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is the use of verb forms within a sentence. The nonfinite to-infinitive verb "to build" is correctly used to form a subordinate clause that indicates what Dr. Ericsson uses advanced physics and engineering principles for.

Choice A is incorrect because the finite verb "builds" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that indicates what Dr. Ericsson uses the principles for. Choice B is incorrect because the finite verb "has built" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that indicates what Dr. Ericsson uses the principles for. Choice D is incorrect because the finite verb "built" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that indicates what Dr. Ericsson uses the principles for.
